lines.text: Firework Cruises | Walt Disney World Resort
Fireworks Cruises
Charter a private watercraft and set sail on a relaxing specialty cruise from one of the Walt Disney World marinas to enjoy a stunning fireworks show.
To reserve a fireworks cruise for July 3 through July 5, 2026, please call (407) 939-7529 to check availability. Guests younger than 18 years of age must have parent or guardian permission to call.
Know Before You Go
Pricing
Prices start at $499, plus tax, and vary by date. Boats seat up to 10 Guests.
Reservations

Make a reservation up to 60 days prior to your visit for Happily Ever After or Luminous The Symphony of Us. You may also reserve via the My Disney Experience app or by calling (407) WDW-PLAY or (407) 939-7529. Guests younger than 18 years of age must have parent or guardian permission to call. No bookings are accepted after noon of the day prior to the cruise to be reserved. Inquiries regarding availability made within the booking cut-off window may only be done at the location.
Enjoy Exceptional Cruise Experiences
Magic Kingdom Fireworks Cruise
Fun for all ages, nighttime cruises provide the perfect opportunity to see the brilliant Happily Ever After fireworks from an amazing vantage point—your own chartered boat!
Read More
Fun for all ages, nighttime cruises provide the perfect opportunity to see the brilliant Happily Ever After fireworks from an amazing vantage point—your own chartered boat!
Relax in comfort as your party embarks on the waters of Seven Seas Lagoon and Bay Lake near Magic Kingdom park—with synchronized audio on board to fully immerse you in the magic.
Departure Locations

Sail from the Boat Nook Marina at Disney’s Contemporary Resort to view Happily Ever After. Additional pickup locations may be available within the Magic Kingdom area by visiting your Resort concierge or calling (407) WDW-PLAY or (407) 939-7529 after booking your cruise. Guests younger than 18 years of age must have parent or guardian permission to call.
What’s Included
Each cruise is accompanied by a captain and includes assorted snacks and soft drinks.
Important Details
Before you book, please be aware of the following:
Full payment is due at the time of booking.

In rare instances, fireworks shows may be rescheduled or cancelled. Please refer to the entertainment schedule or My Disney Experience app to reconfirm the fireworks showtimes 2 weeks prior to your reservation and again on the day of your reservation. Fireworks are subject to change and not guaranteed.
Guests ages 17 and younger must be accompanied by a paying adult.
Experiences may be cancelled due to inclement weather, but will still occur in rain and cold. Umbrellas, ponchos and sunscreen are not provided.
Guests ages 12 and younger are required to wear a Disney-provided life vest and Guests older than 12 years of age are required to have a Disney-issued life vest on board.
Reservations are nontransferable and may not be sold or bartered.
Allow up to 1 hour 30 minutes to travel to your destination when traveling within Walt Disney World Resort.
You should arrive 1 hour and 15 minutes prior to fireworks start time.
Guests in wheelchairs/ECVs must walk aboard unassisted.
There is a 24-hour cancellation policy. Full price will be charged/forfeited if the Guest cancels within 24 hours or fails to show up for the reservation.
Check available cruise days.
EPCOT Fireworks Cruise
Don’t miss the chance to watch the dazzling Luminous The Symphony of Us fireworks spectacular right from the water. It’s an incredible finale to the day’s festivities!
Read More
Don’t miss the chance to watch the dazzling Luminous The Symphony of Us fireworks spectacular right from the water. It’s an incredible finale to the day’s festivities!

Raise anchor as your chartered boat sets off for International Gateway near World Showcase Lagoon to watch the skies light up over EPCOT. This magnificent fireworks show adds an amazing “wow” factor to your cruise.
Departure Location
Depart on your cruise from the Bayside Marina at Disney’s Yacht & Beach Club Resorts.
What’s Included
Each cruise is accompanied by a captain and includes assorted snacks and soft drinks.
